name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Joshua, TX's Cash America Pawn at 444 N Broadway St offers quick cash loans and sales for jewelry, electronics, and valuables with no credit check required.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn in Joshua, TX is located at 444 N Broadway St, a convenient standalone shop in the heart of Joshua's commercial district. Open Monday through Friday from 10AM to 6PM and Saturday from 10AM to 5PM, this location serves North Texas residents and Joshua visitors with reliable in-person service. The shop's accessible Broadway location makes it easy for Joshua shoppers to stop in during business hours.

This Joshua location specializes in fast evaluations and fair pricing for gold, silver, jewelry, electronics, tools, collectibles, and other valuable items. You can pawn items for short-term cash needs or sell outright for immediate payment. Call +1 817-426-5026 to discuss your items before visiting, or bring them in during hours for a quick on-site appraisal and same-day transaction.

If you're a Joshua, TX resident facing unexpected expenses, bring a valid photo ID and your item to complete a transaction the same day. Cash America Pawn handles straightforward pawn and sale transactions without credit requirements, making it a practical option when you need immediate cash. The Broadway St location is staffed to process transactions quickly and professionally.
pros: Massive network of 3,300+ locations across 29 states plus international presence ensures accessibility in most areas
Immediate cash payouts on the spot with no credit check or approval delays required
Non-recourse loans mean you're not liable for repayment beyond losing your pledged item
Accepts almost any item of value (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, gold, etc.) for loans or direct purchase
Layaway service with just 10% down makes merchandise more affordable without requiring credit
Gold and precious metal buying provides quick cash conversion for items most households have
Publicly traded company (S&P 400 component) provides corporate accountability and financial transparency
cons: Pawn loans effectively charge high implicit interest through forfeiture of collateral value, making them very expensive compared to traditional loans
Limited to small loan amounts secured by physical property, restricting access for those needing larger sums
Losing pledged items creates financial burden and emotional loss beyond typical loan interest, particularly for sentimental possessions
No reporting to credit bureaus means loans don't help build or improve credit history
Default consequences are automatic item loss rather than payment plans or debt management options
best_for: Individuals in immediate financial emergencies needing same-day cash without credit approval
People with valuable items (gold, jewelry, electronics) they're willing to temporarily forfeit for short-term funds
Consumers excluded from traditional banking who lack credit history or have poor credit scores
Those seeking retail merchandise through affordable layaway with minimal down payment
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing genuine financial emergencies who have valuable personal property they're willing to temporarily pledge for immediate cash. However, pawn loans should only be used as a last resort for truly urgent situations, as the implicit costs of losing collateral make them significantly more expensive than traditional loans, payday alternatives, or credit union PALs.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property pledges
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying with immediate cash payment
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Item purchase directly (selling unwanted items to the store)
Online store locator to find nearest location
Online inventory browsing and item search
Lease-to-own and retail finance solutions through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
In-store merchandise browsing across multiple categories
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 444 N Broadway St, Joshua, TX. Quick cash loans for jewelry, electronics & valuables. No credit needed. Open Mon-Sat.
